title: Sonic The Hedgehog Beds (Pixel Consistent)
description: Add custom textures to bed with characters from Sonic 2 game
body:
This pack add some Sonic characters textures to bed. Sonic, Tails, Knuckles, Robotnik and a few Badnik

Texture comes from the genesis game sprites

Check this [Link](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sonic-the-hedgehog-beds) for a NON pixel consistent version of this pack

You can see the difference between normal and pixel consistent in the gallery pictures

This pack should work on any version of the game. Just ignore if minecraft says it is outdated.

Modpack? -> Yes! Also on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/sonic-the-hedgehog-beds)

![Beds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b02227d4d9556772f7c6fda7d054d17e00d29101.png)
